Plain-language professional summary:

Notes:
Jeffrey V. Johnson, Ph.D. builds infrastructure for model evaluation and agent systems. The portfolio connects specifications, bounded authority, reproducible environments, automated checks, and reviewable evidence. Private project repositories remain intentionally unlinked.
